spec_match.rationale: The page probes the real element.blocking DOMTokenList and models the ChromeStatus rel=expect full-frame-rate behavior.

interactive.rationale: The rebuilt page has controls for element kind, token set, timeline branch, target parse time, and timeout, with live DOM and timeline readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index and concept now both frame full-frame-rate as an origin-trial rel=expect frame-rate throttling hint.

edge_cases.rationale: The page surfaces unsupported token support, wrong spelling, invalid DOMTokenList token, missing target, timeout, and user-interaction restore branches.

references.rationale: The page cites chromestatus.com/feature/5207202081800192, the WHATWG issue, and the HTML blocking attributes section.

design_system.rationale: The updated CSS uses shared design tokens, no raw demo colors, and no unpaired local button background overrides.

summary: The matrix now exercises the real blocking attribute DOM surface, models full-frame-rate restore behavior, documents edge cases, and carries the correct ChromeStatus self-heal link.
